tasks.label: diag-one-run
tasks.command: cd /Users/rami/Downloads/soloFirm && node -e "(async()=>{const payload={businessIdea:'Mobile car detailing service for busy professionals in Providence',location:'Rhode Island',budgetRange:'$5,000 - $25,000',entityPreference:'LLC',teamSize:'Solo'};const c=new AbortController();setTimeout(()=>c.abort(),240000);const res=await fetch('http://localhost:3003/api/orchestrate',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(payload),signal:c.signal});console.log('status',res.status);if(!res.ok||!res.body){console.log(await res.text());return;}const reader=res.body.getReader();const dec=new TextDecoder();let buf='';let done=false;while(!done){const r=await reader.read();done=r.done;if(r.value){buf+=dec.decode(r.value,{stream:true});let lines=buf.split('\n');buf=lines.pop()||'';for(const line of lines){if(line.startsWith('data: ')){try{const e=JSON.parse(line.slice(6));if(e.type==='run_complete'){console.log('RUN',e.run?.id,e.run?.created_at,e.run?.completed_at,(e.run?.presentation?.roadmap||[]).length);return;}}catch{}}}}}console.log('no run_complete');})().catch(e=>{console.error('ERR',e?.name,e?.message);process.exit(1);})"
